info.title: IGVF Catalog - Development
info.description: Development IGVF Catalog OpenAPI compliant REST API built using tRPC with Express. Our database uses 0-based, half-open coordinates for genomic coordinates in the GRCh38 (human) and GRCm39 (mouse) reference genomes. Data is licensed under the Creative Commons license and the software is licensed under the MIT license.

get.description:
Retrieve genetic variants.
Example: organism = Homo sapiens or Mus musculus.
mouse_strain = CAST_EiJ (only for mouse variants).
The examples below are specific to Homo sapiens:
region = chr1:1157520-1158189 (maximum length: 10kb),
GENCODE_category = coding or noncoding (only for human variants),
rsid = rs58658771,
spdi = NC_000020.11:3658947:A:G,
hgvs = NC_000020.11:g.3658948A>G,
ca_id = CA739473472,
variant_id = NC_000020.11:3658947:A:G.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve genetic variants within a genomic region by frequencies.
Example: region = chr3:186741137-186742238 (maximum length: 10kb),
source = bravo_af,
GENCODE_category = coding (or noncoding),
spdi = NC_000003.12:186741142:G:A,
hgvs = NC_000003.12:g.186741143G>A,
rsid = rs1720801112,
ca_id = CA739473472,
minimum_af: 0,
maximum_af:0.8.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve variant-gene pairs including eQTLs & splice QTLs from AFGR, eQTL Catalogue, and IGFV by internal variant ids.
The following parameters can be used to set thresholds on -log10 p_value: gt (>), gte (>=), lt (<), lte (<=).
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the corresponding variants and genes.
Example: spdi = NC_000001.11:630556:T:C,
hgvs = NC_000001.11:g.630557T>C,
ca_id = CA16774863,
variant_id = NC_000001.11:630556:T:C,
region = chr3:186741137-186742238 (maximum length: 10kb),
log10pvalue = gte:2,
effect_size = lte:0.001,
biosample_term = EFO_0005292,
biological_context = lymphoblastoid cell line,
name = 'modulates expression of' or 'modulates splicing of'
inverse_name = 'expression modulated by' or 'splicing modulated by'
label = eQTL (should pass other parameters such as source along with label),
method = Variant-EFFECTS,
files_fileset = IGVFFI9602ILPC,
source = AFGR.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve drugs associated with the query variants from pharmGKB.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the drugs.
Example: variant_id = NC_000001.11:230714139:T:G,
spdi = NC_000001.11:230714139:T:G,
hgvs = NC_000001.11:g.230714140T>G,
rsid = rs5050 (at least one of the variant fields needs to be specified),
ca_id = CA10610220,
region = chr3:186741137-186742238 (maximum length: 10kb),
the following filters on variants-drugs association can be combined for query:
GENCODE_category = coding (or noncoding),
pmid = 20824505,
phenotype_categories = Toxicity.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve genetic variants summary.
Example: variant_id = NC_000020.11:3658947:A:G,
spdi = NC_000020.11:3658947:A:G,
hgvs = NC_000020.11:g.3658948A>G.
ca_id = CA739473472

Retrieve allele-specific transcription factor binding events from ADASTRA in cell type-specific context,
allele-specific transcription factor binding events from GVATdb, pQTL from UKB by querying variants, and predicted allele specific binding from SEMpl.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the variant-transcription factor pairs, and ontology terms of the cell types.
Example: variant_id = NC_000020.11:4814342:G:A,
spdi = NC_000017.11:7166092:G:A,
hgvs = NC_000017.11:g.7166093G>A,
rsid = rs186021206,
ca_id = CA14813418,
region = chr17:7166090-7166095 (maximum length: 10kb),
organism = Homo sapiens,
label = pQTL (or allele-specific binding),
name = 'modulates binding of' or 'associated with levels of',
inverse_name = 'binding modulated by' or 'level associated with',
method = SEMVAR,
files_fileset = IGVFFI0183ELIK,
source = UKB.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve diseases and genes associated with the query variant from ClinGen.
Example: variant_id = NC_000012.12:102917129:T:C
spdi = NC_000012.12:102917129:T:C,
hgvs = NC_000012.12:g.102917130T>C,
rsid = rs62514891,
ca_id = CA114360,
chr = chr12,
region = chr17:7166090-7166095 (maximum length: 10kb),
assertion = Pathogenic,
position (zero base) = 102917129,
pmid = 2574002.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve genetic variants in linkage disequilibrium (LD).
The following parameters can be used to set thresholds on r2 and d_prime: gt (>), gte (>=), lt (<), lte (<=).
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the variants.
Example: variant_id = NC_000011.10:9083634:A:T,
chr = chr11, position (zero base) = 9083634,
spdi = NC_000011.10:9083634:A:T,
hgvs = NC_000011.10:g.9083635A>T,
rsid = rs60960132,
ca_id = CA217534780,
region = chr17:7166090-7166095 (maximum length: 10kb),
r2 = gte:0.8,
d_prime = gt:0.9,
ancestry = EUR.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve variant-trait pairs from GWAS by variants.
Filters on phenotype ontology id can be used together.
The following parameters can be used to set thresholds on -log10 p_value: gt (>), gte (>=), lt (<), lte (<=).
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the studies.
Example: variant_id = NC_000001.11:1023572:A:G (gwas) / NC_000007.14:152660654:T:A (igvf),
rsid = rs2710889,
spdi = NC_000001.11:1023572:A:G,
hgvs = NC_000001.11:g.1009731C>T,
ca_id = CA10655131,
region = chr1:1023570-1023573 (maximum length: 10kb),
phenotype_id = EFO_0004339,
log10pvalue = gte:5,
mouse_strain = CAST_EiJ,
files_fileset = IGVFFI0332UGDD,
method = SGE,
class = observed data,
label = protein variant effect,
organism = Homo sapiens (or Mus musculus).
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve data from STARR-seq, BlueSTARR, and MPRA for a given variant.
Example: variant_id = NC_000001.11:14772:C:T,
spdi = NC_000001.11:14772:C:T,
hgvs = NC_000001.11:g.14773C>T,
rsid = rs1234567890,
ca_id = CA10655131,
region = chr1:15563-15567 (maximum length: 10kb),
organism = Homo sapiens,
files_fileset = IGVFFI1323RCIE,
element_id = candidate_cis_regulatory_element_chr5_1778763_1779094_GRCh38_ENCFF420VPZ,
significant = true,
method = STARR-seq.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve element gene predictions associated with a given variant.
Example: variant_id = NC_000001.11:1628997:GGG:GG, hgvs = NC_000001.11:g.1629000del,
spdi = NC_000001.11:1628997:GGG:GG, rsid = rs1317845941, ca_id = CA10655131, files_fileset = ENCFF705MLV.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 300.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve a summary of associated genes from GTEx eQTLs & splice QTLs by internal variant ids.
Example: variant_id = NC_000001.11:920568:G:A, spdi = NC_000001.11:920568:G:A, hgvs = NC_000001.11:g.920569G>A, ca_id = CA10655131, files_fileset = IGVFFI9602ILPC.

Retrieve a list of human genes if region is in a coding variant. Otherwise, it returns the nearest human genes on each side.
Example: region = chr1:11868-14409 or region = chr1:1157520-1158189 (maximum length: 10kb).

Retrieve genes and proteins associated with a variant matched by ID.
Example: variant_id = NC_000001.11:630556:T:C.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve a summary count of all methods reporting variants in a given region.
Example: region = chr1:1157520-1158520 (maximum length: 10kb).

Retrieve GNOMAD alleles for variants in a given region.
Example: region = chr1:1157520-1158520 (maximum length: 10kb).
Region limit: 1kb pairs.

Retrieve coding variants from dbSNFP associated with a variant.
Example: variant_id = NC_000001.11:65564:A:T,
spdi = NC_000001.11:65564:A:T,
hgvs = NC_000001.11:g.65565A>T,
ca_id = CA337806511,
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.

Retrieve genomic elements associated with a given variant.
Example: variant_id = NC_000005.10:1779621:C:G,
spdi = NC_000005.10:1779621:C:G,
hgvs = NC_000005.10:g.1779622C>G,
rsid = rs1735214522,
ca_id = CA1522823495,
region = chr5:1779619-1779629,
biosample_term = EFO_0002067,
biological_context = K562,
method = BlueSTARR,
files_fileset = IGVFFI1663LKVQ,
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 300.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve counts of element gene predictions and cell types associated with a given variant.
Example: variant_id = NC_000001.11:1628997:GGG:GG, hgvs = NC_000001.11:g.1629000del,
spdi = NC_000001.11:1628997:GGG:GG, rsid = rs1317845941, ca_id = CA1522823495, files_fileset = ENCFF705MLV.

Retrieve a summary of genetic variants in linkage disequilibrium (LD).
Example: variant_id = NC_000001.11:954257:G:C, hgvs = NC_000011.10:g.9090011A>G, spdi = NC_000011.10:9090010:A:G, ca_id = CA10655063. The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

DEPRECATED. Please use coding-variants/phenotypes/summary.
Retrieve scores of variants associated with phenotypes. Via coding variants edges.
Example: variant_id = NC_000018.10:31546002:CA:GT,
coding_variant_name = DSG2_ENST00000261590_p.Gln873Val_c.2617_2618delinsGT,
files_fileset = IGVFFI6893ZOAA.

Retrieve predicted associated genes and cell types for a given variant.
Example: variant_id = NC_000012.12:69248967:C:T, spdi = NC_000012.12:69248967:C:T,
hgvs = NC_000012.12:g.69248968C>T, rsid = rs544450198, ca_id = CA10655063, region = chr1:1157520-1158189 (maximum length: 10kb).

Retrieve coding variants annotations.
Example: name = OR4F5_ENST00000641515_p.Met1!_c.1A-C,
id = OR4F5_ENST00000641515_p.Met1!_c.1A-C,
hgvsp = p.Met1?,
gene_name = SAMD11,
protein_id = ENSP00000384707,
protein_name = SAM11_HUMAN,
amino_acid_position = 1 (range values are also available, e.g: range:0-2),
transcript_id = ENST00000342066.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 25.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve variants associated with a coding variant.
Example: coding_variant_name = OR4F5_ENST00000641515_p.Gly30Ser_c.88G-A,
hgvsp = p.Gly30Ser,
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve phenotypes associated with the query coding variant.
Example: coding_variant_name = XRCC2_ENST00000359321__NC_000007.14:g.152660700C-T_splicing,
hgvsp = p.Ala103Cys,
protein_name = XRCC2_HUMAN,
gene_name: XRCC2,
amino_acid_position: -1,
transcript_id = ENST00000359321,
method = ESM-1v,
files_fileset = IGVFFI8105TNNO,
organism = Homo sapiens.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve counts of coding variants associated with phenotypes.
Example: gene_id = ENSG00000165841,
files_fileset = IGVFFI6893ZOAA.

Retrieve scores of variants or coding_variants associated with phenotypes. Via coding variants edges.
Example: variant_id = NC_000018.10:31546002:CA:GT,
coding_variant_name = DSG2_ENST00000261590_p.Gln873Val_c.2617_2618delinsGT,
files_fileset = IGVFFI6893ZOAA.

Retrieve genes.
Example: organism = Homo sapiens,
name = SAMD1,
region = chr1:212565300-212620800,
synonym = CKLF,
collection = ACMG73,
study_set = MorPhiC,
gene_id = ENSG00000187642 (Ensembl ids),
gene_type = protein_coding,
hgnc_id = HGNC:28208,
entrez = ENTREZ:84808.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve coexpressed gene pairs from CoXPresdb and genetic interactions from BioGRID.
The following parameters can be used to set thresholds on z_score from CoXPresdb: gt (>), gte (>=), lt (<), lte (<=).
Example: organism = Homo sapiens or Mus musculus,
source = COXPRESdb,
interaction_type = dosage growth defect (sensu BioGRID),
gene_id = ENSG00000121410,
hgnc_id = HGNC:5,
gene_name = A1BG,
alias = HYST2477,
z_score = gt:4,
label = genetic interference,
method = COXPRESdb,
name = 'interacts with' or 'coexpressed with'
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

enum: dosage lethality (sensu BioGRID), phenotypic enhancement (sensu BioGRID)
dosage lethality (sensu BioGRID), synthetic lethality (sensu BioGRID)
dosage rescue (sensu BioGRID), phenotypic enhancement (sensu BioGRID)
dosage rescue (sensu BioGRID), synthetic growth defect (sensu BioGRID)
negative genetic interaction (sensu BioGRID), synthetic growth defect (sensu BioGRID)
negative genetic interaction (sensu BioGRID), synthetic lethality (sensu BioGRID)
negative genetic interaction (sensu BioGRID), synthetic lethality (sensu BioGRID), synthetic growth defect (sensu BioGRID)
phenotypic enhancement (sensu BioGRID), phenotypic suppression (sensu BioGRID)
phenotypic enhancement (sensu BioGRID), synthetic growth defect (sensu BioGRID)
phenotypic enhancement (sensu BioGRID), synthetic lethality (sensu BioGRID)
phenotypic suppression (sensu BioGRID), negative genetic interaction (sensu BioGRID)
phenotypic suppression (sensu BioGRID), phenotypic enhancement (sensu BioGRID)
positive genetic interaction (sensu BioGRID), negative genetic interaction (sensu BioGRID)
positive genetic interaction (sensu BioGRID), phenotypic enhancement (sensu BioGRID)
positive genetic interaction (sensu BioGRID), synthetic lethality (sensu BioGRID)
positive genetic interaction (sensu BioGRID), synthetic rescue (sensu BioGRID)
synthetic growth defect (sensu BioGRID), phenotypic enhancement (sensu BioGRID)
synthetic haploinsufficiency (sensu BioGRID), dosage rescue (sensu BioGRID)
synthetic haploinsufficiency (sensu BioGRID), phenotypic enhancement (sensu BioGRID), phenotypic suppression (sensu BioGRID)
synthetic lethality (sensu BioGRID), phenotypic enhancement (sensu BioGRID), phenotypic suppression (sensu BioGRID)
synthetic lethality (sensu BioGRID), synthetic growth defect (sensu BioGRID)

get.description:
Retrieve proteins from genes.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the proteins.
Example: gene_name = ATF3,
alias = CKLF,
gene_id = ENSG00000170558 (Ensembl ID),
hgnc_id = HGNC:13723.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve variant-gene pairs including eQTLs & splice QTLs from AFGR, eQTL Catalogue, and IGFV by Ensembl gene ids.
The following parameters can be used to set thresholds on -log10 p_value: gt (>), gte (>=), lt (<), lte (<=).
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the corresponding variants and genes.
Example: source = AFGR,
gene_id = ENSG00000187642,
hgnc_id = HGNC:28208,
gene_name = SAMD11,
alias = CKLF,
label = eQTL,
effect_size = lte:0.001,
log10pvalue = gte:2
biosample_term = EFO_0005292,
biological_context = lymphoblastoid cell line,
method = Variant-EFFECTS,
files_fileset = IGVFFI9602ILPC,
name = 'modulates expression of' or 'modulates splicing of'
inverse_name = 'expression modulated by' or 'splicing modulated by'.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve disease-gene pairs from Orphanet and ClinGen by genes.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the disease terms, and the variants associated with the disease from ClinGen.
Example: gene_id = ENSG00000171759,
gene_name = PAH,
alias = PKU1,
hgnc_id = HGNC:8582.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 25.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve pathways from genes.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the pathways and genes.
Example: gene_id = ENSG00000183840,
hgnc_id = HGNC:4496,
gene_name = GPR39,
alias = ZnR.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve genes structure.
you can filter by one of the four categories: gene, transcript, protein or region.
Example: organism = Homo sapiens,
region = chr1:212565300-212620800,
gene_id = ENSG00000187642 (Ensembl ids),
gene_name = ATF3,
transcript_id = ENST00000443707 (Ensembl ids),
transcript_id = TNF-207,
type = exon,
protein_id = ENSP00000305769,
protein_name = SMAD1_HUMAN.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve transcripts from genes.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the transcripts.
Example: gene_name = ATF3, hgnc_id = HGNC:28208,
alias = CKLF, gene_id = ENSG00000187642 (Ensembl ids).
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve genomic elements and gene pairs by querying genes.
One of those fields is required: gene_id, hgnc_id, gene_name, alias, method, files_fileset.
Example: gene_id = ENSG00000187961,
gene_name = SARS1,
hgnc = HGNC:10537,
alias = SERRS,
method = Pertub-seq,
files_fileset = IGVFFI3069QCRA.
biosample_term = EFO_0002067.
biological_context = placenta from ENCDO091OEF.
source = IGVF.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the genes, genomic element.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve variants associated with genes or proteins that match a query.
Example: query = ATF1.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve scores and predictions of associated coding variants for one specific gene.
Example: gene_id = ENSG00000196584, gene_name = XRCC2, alias = FANCU, hgnc_id = HGNC:12829, method = MutPred2, files_fileset = IGVFFI6893ZOAA.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve genes or proteins associated with either genes or proteins that match a query.
Example: query = ATF1.
The limit parameter controls the page size of related items and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve scores and predictions of associated coding variants for one specific gene.
Example: gene_id = ENSG00000196584, gene_name = XRCC2, alias = FANCU, hgnc_id = HGNC:12829, method = MutPred2, files_fileset = IGVFFI6893ZOAA.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve GO terms from either proteins or transcripts.
Example: query = ENSP00000384707 or query = ENST00000663609.
name = 'involved in' or 'is located in' or 'has the function'
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve transcripts.
Example: region = chr20:9537369-9839076,
transcript_type = protein_coding,
transcript_id = ENST00000443707 (Ensembl ids).
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve genes from transcripts.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the genes.
Example: region = chr1:711800-740000,
transcript_id = ENST00000443707 (Ensembl ID).
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve proteins from transcripts.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the proteins.
Example: region = chr16:67562500-67640000,
transcript_type = protein_coding,
transcript_id = ENST00000401394 (Ensembl ID).
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve proteins.
Example: protein_id = ENSP00000384707.1 or ENSP00000384707 (Ensembl IDs) or P49711-2 (Uniprot ids).
name = CTCF,
uniprot_name = CTCF_HUMAN,
uniprot_full_name = Transcriptional repressor CTCF,
dbxrefs = P49711,
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 50.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve genes from proteins.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the genes.
Example: protein_id = ENSP00000384707.1 or ENSP00000384707 (Ensembl IDs) or P49711-2 (Uniprot ids),
protein_name = CTCF,
uniprot_name = CTCF_HUMAN,
uniprot_full_name = Transcriptional repressor CTCF,
dbxrefs = P49711.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve motifs for proteins.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the motifs.
Example: protein_id = ENSP00000384707.1 or ENSP00000384707 (Ensembl IDs) or P49711-2 (Uniprot ids),
protein_name = CTCF,
uniprot_name = CTCF_HUMAN,
uniprot_full_name = Transcriptional repressor CTCF,
dbxrefs = P49711,
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 1000.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve allele-specific transcription factor binding events from ADASTRA in cell type-specific context,
allele-specific transcription factor binding events from GVATdb, pQTL from UKB by querying proteins, and predicted allele specific binding from SEMpl.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the variant-transcription factor pairs, and the ontology terms of the cell types.
Example: protein_id = ENSP00000384707.1 or ENSP00000384707 (Ensembl IDs) or P49711-2 (Uniprot ids),
protein_name = CTCF,
uniprot_name = CTCF_HUMAN,
uniprot_full_name = Transcriptional repressor CTCF,
dbxrefs = P49711,
name = 'modulates binding of' or 'associated with levels of',
inverse_name = 'binding modulated by' or 'level associated with',
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve protein-protein interactions.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the proteins.
Example: protein_id = ENSP00000384707.1 or ENSP00000384707 (Ensembl IDs) or P49711-2 (Uniprot ids),
protein_name = CTCF,
uniprot_name = CTCF_HUMAN,
uniprot_full_name = Transcriptional repressor CTCF,
dbxrefs = P49711,
detection_method = affinity chromatography technology,
interaction_type = physical association,
pmid = 28514442,
label = affinity chromatography technology,
method = physical association,
source = BioGRID.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 250.
Pagination is 0-based.

enum: comigration in non denaturing gel electrophoresis
ion mobility mass spectrometry of complexes
mass spectrometry study of hydrogen/deuterium exchange
protein cross-linking with a bifunctional reagent
proteinchip(r) on a surface-enhanced laser desorption/ionization
two hybrid bait and prey pooling approach
comigration in non denaturing gel electrophoresis
ion mobility mass spectrometry of complexes
mass spectrometry study of hydrogen/deuterium exchange
protein cross-linking with a bifunctional reagent
proteinchip(r) on a surface-enhanced laser desorption/ionization
two hybrid bait and prey pooling approach
adp ribosylation reaction, direct interaction, enzymatic reaction
colocalization, direct interaction, physical association, association

get.description:
Retrieve complexes by querying from protein participants.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the complexes.
Example: protein_id = ENSP00000411322.1 or ENSP00000411322 (Ensembl IDs) or P67870 (Uniprot ids),
protein_name = CSNK2B,
uniprot_name = CSK2B_HUMAN,
uniprot_full_name = Casein kinase II subunit beta,
dbxrefs = P67870.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve transcripts from proteins.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the transcripts.
Example: protein_name = CTCF,
uniprot_name = CTCF_HUMAN,
uniprot_full_name = Transcriptional repressor CTCF,
dbxrefs = P49711,
protein_id = ENSP00000384707.1 or ENSP00000384707 (Ensembl IDs) or P49711-2 (Uniprot ids).
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve genomic elements.
Example: region = chr1:1157520-1158189,
source_annotation = dELS: distal Enhancer-like signal,
type = candidate cis regulatory element,
files_fileset = IGVFFI5749WPVK,
source = ENCODE_SCREEN (ccREs).
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 1000.
Pagination is 0-based.

enum: CA-H3K4me3: chromatin accessible + H3K4me3 high signal

get.description:
Retrieve genomic elements and gene pairs by querying genomic elements.
One of those fields is required: region, method, files_fileset.
Example region = chr1:903900-904900.
source_annotation = enhancer.
region_type = accessible dna elements;
method = CRISPR FACS screen.
files_fileset = ENCFF968BZL.
biosample_term = EFO_0002067.
biological_context = placenta from ENCDO091OEF.
source = ENCODE,
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the genes, genomic element.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

enum: CA-H3K4me3: chromatin accessible + H3K4me3 high signal

get.description:
Retrieve variants associated with genomic elements.
Example: region = chr5:1779339-1779683,
type = candidate cis regulatory element,
biosample_term = EFO_0002067,
biological_context = K562,
method = BlueSTARR,
source = AFGR,
files_fileset = IGVFFI1663LKVQ.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 300.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve MPRA experiments by querying positions of genomic elements.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the cell ontology terms.
Example: region_type = tested elements, region = chr10:100038743-100038963.
You can also filter out by study file, e.g., files_fileset = ENCFF475FKV; method, e.g MPRA; and source, e.g. IGVF or ENCODE.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 50.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve disease-gene pairs from Orphanet by diseases.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the genes and diseases.
Example: disease_name = fibrosis,
disease_id = Orphanet_586,
source = Orphanet.
Either disease_name or disease_id are required.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve variants and genes associated with the query disease from ClinGen.
Example: disease_id = MONDO_0009861,
disease_name = phenylketonuria,
pmid = 2574002.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve variant-trait pairs from GWAS by phenotypes.
The following parameters can be used to set thresholds on -log10 p_value: gt (>), gte (>=), lt (<), lte (<=).
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the studies.
Example: phenotype ID = EFO_0007937,
phenotype_name = cell survival,
log10pvalue = gte:5,
method = SGE,
class = observed data,
label = protein variant effect,
files_fileset = IGVFFI0332UGDD.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve coding variants associated with the query phenotype.
Example: phenotype ID = OBA_0000128,
phenotype_name = protein stability,
files_fileset = IGVFFI2574RDFO,
method = VAMP-seq,
organism = Homo sapiens.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve ontology terms.
Example: term_id = Orphanet_101435,
name = Rare genetic eye disease,
synonyms = WTC11,
source = EFO,
subontology = molecular_function.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 1000.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve all parent nodes of an ontology term.
Example: ontology_term_id = CHEBI_100001.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve all child nodes of an ontology term.
Example: ontology_term_id = CHEBI_20857.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve all paths between two ontology terms (i.e. transitive closure).
Example: ontology_term_id_start = UBERON_0003663,
ontology_term_id_end = UBERON_0014892

Retrieve annotations associated with a GO term.
Example: go_term_id = GO_1990590.
name = 'has component' or 'contains' or 'is a function of'
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve transcription factor binding motifs from HOCOMOCO.
Example: tf_name = STAT3_HUMAN,
source = HOCOMOCOv11.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve proteins and complexes for motifs.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the proteins and complexes.
Example: tf_name = ATF1_HUMAN,
source = HOCOMOCOv11.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 1000.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve studies from GWAS.
Example: study_id = GCST007798,
pmid = 30929738.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve complexes.
Example: complex_id = CPX-11,
name = SMAD2,
description = phosphorylation.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve protein participants for complexes.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the proteins.
Example: complex_id = CPX-9,
complex_name = SMAD2,
description = phosphorylation.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 50.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve drugs (chemicals).
Example: drug_id = PA448497 (chemical ids from pharmGKB),
name = aspirin.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 1000.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve variants associated with the query drugs from pharmGKB.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the variants.
Example: drug_id = PA448497,
drug_name = aspirin, (at least one of the drug fields needs to be specified),
the following filters on variants-drugs association can be combined for query:
pmid = 20824505,
phenotype_categories = Toxicity.
organism = Homo sapiens.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.
Health check endpoint for the API service

Retrieve pathways from Reactome.
Example: id = R-HSA-164843,
name = 2-LTR circle formation,
is_in_disease = true.
name_aliases = 2-LTR circle formation,
is_top_level_pathway = true.
disease_ontology_terms = DOID_526,
go_biological_process = GO_0006015.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

post.description:
Ask a question that interests you. This API is password protected.
Set verbose = true to retrieve AQL and AQL results.
Example: query = Tell me about the gene SAMD11.

get.description:
Autocomplete names for genes and proteins based on prefix search.
Example: term = TP53,
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve genes from pathways.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the genes.
Example: id = R-HSA-164843,
name = 2-LTR circle formation,
name_aliases = 2-LTR circle formation,
disease_ontology_terms = DOID_526,
go_biological_process = GO_0006015.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve data about a specific dataset.
Example: file_fileset_id = ENCFF004PFU,
fileset_id = ENCSR359DFW,
lab = jesse-engreitz,
preferred_assay_title = DNase-seq,
method = MPRA,
donor_id = ENCDO000AAK,
sample_term = EFO_0002784,
sample_summary = GM12878,
software = Distal regulation ENCODE-rE2G,
class = prediction,
source = ENCODE.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve related pathway pairs from Reactome.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the pathway pairs.
Example: id = R-HSA-164843,
name = 2-LTR circle formation,
name_aliases = 2-LTR circle formation,
disease_ontology_terms = DOID_526,
go_biological_process = GO_0006015.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve data from STARR-seq, BlueSTARR, and MPRA for a given biosample.
Example: biosample_id = EFO_0002067,
biosample_name = k562,
method = STARR-seq,
files_fileset = IGVFFI0099XJHU,
element_id = candidate_cis_regulatory_element_chr5_1778763_1779094_GRCh38_ENCFF420VPZ,
significant = true,
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve regulatory or response genes for a given regulatory gene. The network is modeled as: (regulators) -> (responses).
Example: regulator_gene_id = ENSG00000143190,
regulator_gene_name = POU2F1,
regulator_hgnc = HGNC:9212,
regulator_alias = OCT1,
response_gene_id = ENSG00000152284,
response_gene_name = TCF7L1,
response_hgnc = HGNC:11640,
response_alias = TCF3,
p_value = gte:0,
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 100.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve genomic elements and gene pairs by querying genomic elements.
Region is required. Example region = chr1:903900-904900; source_annotation = enhancer.

You can further filter the results by biosample. For example:
biosample_name = placenta from ENCDO091OEF.
It is also possible to filter by a specific study fileset:
files_fileset = ENCFF968BZL.
And by method, e.g CRISPR FACS screen.
Filters on source, region_type and source_annotation work only in specific combinations based on data availability.
For example:
1. source = ENCODE_EpiRaction,
region_type = accessible dna elements;
source_annotation = enhancer.
2. source = ENCODE-E2G-DNaseOnly and ENCODE-E2G-Full,
region_type = accessible dna elements;
source_annotation = enhancer.
3. source = ENCODE-E2G-CRISPR, region_type = tested elements
[Note: the enhancers list includes all elements that were found to be positive (with significant = True)
for any tested gene while the tested elements lists all the elements ever tested but found to be negative (with significant = False) for all tested genes] ;
source_annotation = enhancer (positive cases) or negative control (negative cases).
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the genes, genomic element and biosamples.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 500.
Pagination is 0-based.

Retrieve MPRA expriments by querying cell ontology terms.
Set verbose = true to retrieve full info on the tested genomic elements.
Example: biosample_name = hepg2,
method = MPRA,
source = IGVF or ENCODE,
files_fileset = ENCFF475FKV.
The limit parameter controls the page size and can not exceed 50.
Pagination is 0-based.
